_metadata.description: SIFI infrastructure component CAD assessment data. Sources: public vendor PQC roadmaps, NIST FIPS 203/204/205, NIST IR 8547, vendor release notes.
_metadata.cad_formula: CAD(c) = w_alg*alg_gap + w_api*api_surface + w_key*key_constraints + w_comp*comp_overhead + w_proc*proc_months_normalized

risk_tiers.critical: Processes cardholder data or financial settlement; directly on critical path
risk_tiers.high: Key management or TLS termination for production systems
risk_tiers.medium: Internal services not directly in CDE

components.name: F5 BIG-IP LTM (Hardware Appliance)
components.notes: Hardware replacement required; F5 PQC roadmap targets software VE first (2026+); hardware appliances have no announced PQC timeline. Every replacement requires CAB + PCI revalidation.
components.source: F5 TechDocs 17.x SSL/TLS release notes; F5 PQC statement 2024

components.name: F5 BIG-IP Virtual Edition (VE)
components.notes: Software VE upgrade possible without hardware replacement but requires firmware update + CAB approval. PQC roadmap not firm.
components.source: F5 PQC blog post 2024; F5 TechDocs BIG-IP 17.x

components.name: Thales Luna Network HSM 7
components.notes: Luna 7 has limited PQC support (Kyber only in firmware 7.8.0 beta). Full FIPS 203/204/205 support requires Luna 10 hardware. HSM replacement requires FIPS 140-3 re-validation.
components.source: Thales Luna 7 PQC data sheet 2024; Thales thalesdocs.com

components.name: Entrust nShield HSM
components.notes: Entrust nShield PQC roadmap includes Dilithium in CodeSafe SDK; full support timeline unclear.
components.source: Entrust PQC white paper 2024

components.name: Palo Alto PAN-OS (Next-Gen Firewall)
components.notes: PAN-OS 12.x adds TLS 1.3 inspection; PQC inspection capability on roadmap for PAN-OS 13+. Inline TLS inspection of Kyber requires kernel-level changes.
components.source: Palo Alto PAN-OS 12.0 release notes; PA PQC readiness blog 2024

components.name: Cisco ASA Firewall
components.notes: Cisco ASA 9.x has no PQC roadmap. Cisco Firepower/FTD has limited announcements. Hardware replacement likely required for some models.
components.source: Cisco ASA 9.22 release notes; Cisco PQC advisory 2024

components.name: Fortinet FortiGate
components.notes: FortiOS 7.6 adds experimental Kyber support for VPN. Full TLS inspection PQC capability in roadmap.
components.source: Fortinet FortiOS 7.6 release notes 2024

components.name: Microsoft AD CS (Internal CA)
components.notes: Windows Server 2025 adds CNG PQC API; AD CS template support for Dilithium planned. Existing CA hierarchy must issue new PQC roots (requires SOX change record + new root cert distribution).
components.source: Microsoft Windows Server 2025 CNG PQC preview; MS Security Blog 2024

components.name: EJBCA (Open-Source CA)
components.notes: EJBCA 8.1 supports Dilithium and Kyber via BouncyCastle PQC. Deployment update requires regression testing against existing ACME clients.
components.source: EJBCA 8.1 release notes 2024; PrimeKey PQC blog

components.name: AWS ACM (TLS Termination)
components.notes: AWS ACM deployed Kyber hybrid (X25519Kyber768) for TLS 1.3 in 2023. Full FIPS 203 support on roadmap. Configuration-only change for AWS-managed certs.
components.source: AWS Security blog: PQC announcement Oct 2023; AWS ACM docs

components.name: AWS KMS
components.notes: AWS KMS post-quantum key derivation added in 2023. FIPS 203 key encapsulation on roadmap.
components.source: AWS KMS PQC docs 2023; AWS re:Invent 2024

components.name: HashiCorp Vault
components.notes: Vault 1.17 adds experimental PQC key types via PKCS11. PKI secrets engine requires updated CA backend. Change requires CAB approval.
components.source: HashiCorp Vault 1.17 changelog; HashiCorp PQC roadmap 2024

components.name: Azure Key Vault
components.notes: Azure Key Vault Preview: ML-KEM (Kyber) key operations in preview as of late 2024. Generally available expected 2025.
components.source: Azure Key Vault ML-KEM preview announcement 2024

components.name: OpenSSL 3.x
components.notes: OpenSSL 3.x + OQS Provider gives full FIPS 203/204/205 support today. Native FIPS 203 integration in OpenSSL 3.5 expected 2025. Package update + regression test.
components.source: OQS-OpenSSL 0.10.0 release; OpenSSL 3.5 roadmap

components.name: Java JDK 21+
components.notes: JEP 452 (Key Encapsulation Mechanisms) in JDK 21. ML-KEM (FIPS 203) added in JDK 24 (early access). Production JDK upgrade requires full regression test suite.
components.source: JEP 452; JDK 24 early access release notes 2025

components.name: Windows CNG (Cryptography API)
components.notes: Windows 11 24H2 and Server 2025 add ML-KEM and ML-DSA support via CNG. OS upgrade path; domain policy changes required.
components.source: Microsoft PQC announcement Build 2024; Windows Server 2025 docs

components.name: Nginx (TLS Termination)
components.notes: Nginx uses OpenSSL for TLS; PQC inherited from OpenSSL 3.x + OQS Provider. Config-level change for TLS group selection.
components.source: Nginx 1.27 release notes; OQS-Provider nginx integration guide

components.name: Apache httpd
components.notes: Apache httpd uses mod_ssl (OpenSSL). PQC via OpenSSL + OQS Provider. SSLOpenSSLConfCmd for group selection.
components.source: Apache httpd 2.4.62 release notes; mod_ssl docs

components.name: Custom ACME Client (f5-cert-automator type)
components.notes: Custom ACME clients integrated with F5 BIG-IP require code changes to request PQC certificates from CA and push to F5. Timeline depends on developer availability and regression testing scope.
components.source: IETF draft-ietf-acme-pqc; Let's Encrypt PQC roadmap

components.name: Juniper SRX (Firewall)
components.notes: Junos OS 24.1 adds experimental Kyber for VPN. TLS inspection PQC on roadmap. Hardware models may require upgrade.
components.source: Juniper Junos OS 24.1 feature guide 2024

components.name: IBM DataPower Gateway
components.notes: DataPower 10.5.x adds Kyber hybrid TLS support for IBM-specific deployments. FIPS 203 compliance pending. Heavy use in financial sector API gateways.
components.source: IBM DataPower Gateway 10.5 release notes 2024

components.name: Spring Framework (Java API Gateway)
components.notes: Spring Security 6.x + JDK 24 enables PQC TLS. Dependency upgrade; full test suite required.
components.source: Spring Security 6.4 release notes; Spring PQC issue tracker

components.name: Bouncy Castle (Java/C# Crypto Library)
components.notes: Bouncy Castle 1.77+ includes ML-KEM/ML-DSA beta. API changes needed for PQC algorithms.
components.source: Bouncy Castle changelog 2024; NIST FIPS 203/204 tracking issue

components.name: BoringSSL (Google TLS Library)
components.notes: BoringSSL has X25519Kyber768 hybrid TLS deployed in Chrome. Full FIPS-validated PQC pending.
components.source: Google Security Blog 2023; BoringSSL GitHub hybrid KEM support

components.name: IBM z/OS Cryptographic Services (CPACF)
components.notes: IBM z/OS CPACF hardware acceleration is classical-only. PQC requires z16 Telum II upgrade (2025+ timeline). Mainframe replacement cycle is 5-7 years.
components.source: IBM z/OS Cryptography documentation 2024; IBM z16 PQC announcement

components.name: Venafi Trust Protection Platform
components.notes: Venafi TPP v22+ supports certificate issuance workflow but lacks ML-KEM key discovery. PQC cert lifecycle enforcement requires policy engine update.
components.source: Venafi PQC readiness white paper 2024; Venafi TPP release notes

components.name: AWS CloudHSM
components.notes: AWS CloudHSM uses FIPS 140-2 L3 validated classical HSM. No PQC roadmap announced as of 2024. Replacement requires AWS managed service transition.
components.source: AWS CloudHSM product page; AWS re:Invent 2023 cryptography session

components.name: Keyfactor EJBCA Cloud
components.notes: Keyfactor EJBCA 8.0 adds experimental ML-DSA certificate issuance. Full production PQC support targeted for 2025.
components.source: Keyfactor PQC roadmap 2024; EJBCA 8.0 release notes

components.name: AWS Private CA
components.notes: AWS Private CA (ACM PCA) supports RSA and ECC only. No PQC algorithm support announced. Software-based, so migration is API-change only.
components.source: AWS Private CA documentation 2024; AWS cryptography roadmap

components.name: Kubernetes cert-manager
components.notes: cert-manager 1.14 supports ACME with RSA/ECC. PQC support depends on upstream issuer (EJBCA/ACME server) adding PQC; cert-manager itself is API-agnostic.
components.source: cert-manager documentation v1.14; CNCF TOC review 2024

sifi_estate.description: Simulated SIFI-scale deployment based on typical large bank infrastructure patterns
sifi_estate.notes: F5 BIG-IP hardware (C01) dominates at 22.3% of cryptographic endpoints. OpenSSL (C14) and Java JDK (C15) together represent 26.6% but have the lowest CAD.
